_description: The BookFactory self-learning loop's data store. Two tables: predictions (what the Stage-00 opportunity scorer expected) and observations (real KDP dashboard data after launch). calibration_engine.py fits BSR->units conversions from real observations and measures prediction error so the scorer improves over time. NEVER hand-edit numbers in here that did not come from a real KDP report.
_rules: Every observation row MUST carry a 'source' (e.g. 'KDP dashboard 2026-07-30').
PROMO rows (free days, Countdown) are excluded from the conversion baseline automatically.
A niche stays on the community [EST] table until it has >= 8 non-promo observations, then the engine writes a CALIBRATED rate.
No invented values. Empty is the correct state until real data is logged.
